items.name: The RL67 Herringbone Jacket
items.description: Created to mark the 50th anniversary of Ralph Lauren, the RL67 jacket draws inspiration from a herringbone sport coat that has been a treasured part of Mr. Lauren’s wardrobe since 1971. This reinterpretation is crafted in Italy with a black-and-white wool tweed that was custom-developed with Ireland’s Magee 1866 mill, which has been a Ralph Lauren partner for over 50 years.

items.name: Bewitching Halloween Knitted Longline Blazer
items.description:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=Knits&Category=1&CreatorName=dubit&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

Prepare to be entranced by our Bewitching Halloween Knitted Longline Blazer, a spellbinding addition to your Roblox avatar's wardrobe. This longline blazer seamlessly blends style and charm, featuring an intricate knitted design adorned with bewitching and alluring details. Whether you're wandering through enchanted forests or captivating virtual revelers at costume balls, this blazer ensures that all eyes are on you. The Bewitching Halloween Knitted Longline Blazer exudes an aura of magical elegance and allure, making it the ultimate choice for those who wish to embrace the spirit of Halloween in style.
